blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,417 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 57°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
